# training-tracker

Employee training progress tracking with position requirements, certification management, and alerts

*Auto-generated by update-claude-docs.py on 2026-06-13. Do not edit manually — changes will be overwritten.*

## Architecture
- **Type:** GAS spreadsheet add-on (onOpen menu)
- **Code style:** Mixed `var` and `const`/`let` — check each file and match its style
- **GS files (9):** 01_Menu_and_Setup.gs, 02_Form_and_Dedup.gs, 03_Dashboard.gs, 04_Timeline.gs, 05_Certification.gs, 06_Alerts.gs, 07_UI_Functions.gs, 08_DataSync.gs, DIAGNOSTIC.gs
- **HTML files (4):** AlertSettingsDialog.html, DeduplicationSidebar.html, TimelineDialog.html, index.html

## Sheet Tabs (8)
- `Alert Settings`
- `Certification Log`
- `Daily Training Log`
- `Master Dashboard`
- `Name Deduplication`
- `Position Requirements`
- `Training Needs`
- `Training Schedule`

## Key Patterns
- Spreadsheet add-on (onOpen menu)
- Programmatic triggers
- Trigger cleanup utility
- Email delivery
- Name normalization/deduplication
- Idempotent setup function
- Numbered file convention (01_, 02_, etc.)
